name: Goldstorm Metals Corp.
description: Goldstorm Metals Corp. is a Canada-based precious and base metals exploration company with a primary focus on acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral properties in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia. The company's flagship project is the Crown Project, which is situated situated in a premier mining district and covers several prospective exploration targets. Goldstorm Metals is committed to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and discovery of gold, silver, and copper deposits.
